semantic.role: Unit test suite for the build script's dist packaging exclusion filter
responsibilities: Verify that `shouldExcludeDistEntry` correctly identifies `__mocks__` directory entries as excludable from distribution packages
Verify that non-mock source paths are not excluded by `shouldExcludeDistEntry`
Provide regression coverage for build script packaging logic
outOfScope: Direct integration with build or deployment pipelines
Testing of other build script functions beyond the exclusion filter
invariants: Test files must follow naming convention ending in `.test.ts` or `.spec.ts` (rule: test-file-suffix)

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain correctness of the build packaging filter that strips mock directories from distribution artifacts
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Introduce test coverage for the `shouldExcludeDistEntry` function to ensure `__mocks__` directories are excluded while other paths remain included

English.role: Unit test suite for the build script's dist packaging exclusion filter
responsibilities: Verify that `shouldExcludeDistEntry` correctly identifies `__mocks__` directory entries as excludable from distribution packages
Verify that non-mock source paths are not excluded by `shouldExcludeDistEntry`
Provide regression coverage for build script packaging logic
outOfScope: Direct integration with build or deployment pipelines
Testing of other build script functions beyond the exclusion filter
